ab: Embiyax namu kana, Madas ku munan sayang mha ta qmita alang rudan.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Iq o, mha ta empprngaw drudan.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說太魯閣語。
en: B: Yes! We have to speak Telugu to the seniors.

ab: Aji ta biyaw dhuq da hug?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: Aji biyaw da.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: Baki, miyah nami qmita sunan da.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Ah! mkla namu rmngaw kari Truku o! Tayal knmalu ki da!
ch: B:你們會說太魯閣語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:  You speak Truku! That’s great!

ab: Embiyax namu kana, madas ku munan mha ta qmita hnmaan masu hiya.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田。
en: A:Hello everyone, today my teacher is going to take you to the millet field.

ab: Kiya, mtgsa.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Iyah psbkug kana, iya shungi adas qnqaya namu.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Iq o, mtgsa, madas nami qnqaya kana da.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: Dhuq ta da hug?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: Ini na, thiyaq bi na.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: Usa mlaq qsiya ka isu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: Iq, yaku ka emplaq qsiya na.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: Usa mangal kraji liwaq qbhni ka isu.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: Iq, yaku ka mha lmiwaq qbhni.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Embiyax namu kana, mha ta tbgan klgan mneuedus ka sayang.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: Tayal knmalu kida! emphuya ta msa musa?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: Empeapa ta tdruy bahu.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Enduwa psbkug kana, embarig ta paya da.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: Iq wa.
en: B: Yes.

ab: Brah o klgan qbhni, bukuy o klgan quyu,qita nanak.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: Mtgsa, meisug ku quyu ka yaku.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Ini huya, asi usa qmita qbhni ka isu da.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Babaw kingal iyax tuki do iyah ta pssli hini duri..
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: Iq wa, mhuway su mtgsa.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: Manu ka qntaan su suni.
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Qmita ku lala bi quyu ni qbhni.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: Nhari, mha ta da.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Lita ta tmapaq yayung hug?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: Iq wa, lita da!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: Hbaraw bi seejiq ka nii tmapaq yayung hini.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Msqguq bi ka qsiya gaga, tapaq ta yayung hini da kiya da.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
